name: integration_platform_update_these_ai_notetaking_de
method: [PLATFORM UPDATE] These AI notetaking devices can help you record and transcribe your meetings

phases.name: research
steps: playwright scrape Plaud Note, Friend AI, Otter AI hardware, Limitless Pendant product pages for specs/price/affiliate programs
extract pricing tiers, transcription accuracy claims, battery life, integrations

phases.name: content_gen
steps: claude -p generate comparison table HTML following MONEY_METHODS/APP_FACTORY/builds/email-tools-compared pattern
generate 5 longtail FAQ sections targeting: 'best AI notetaker for meetings', 'plaud note vs otter', 'AI meeting recorder hardware 2026'
insert Amazon Associates affiliate links + direct brand affiliate links with FTC disclosure
